modules.title: Academy Foundations: Teaching on YPP
modules.description: Core facilitation standards, safety norms, and how we run engaging sessions.

checkpoints.title: List three facilitation priorities from the video
checkpoints.description: Capture three actionable takeaways you will use in your next session.

quizQuestions.question: What should be clear in the first two minutes of class?
options: Objective, success criteria, and participation norms
quizQuestions.correctAnswer: Objective, success criteria, and participation norms
quizQuestions.explanation: Opening clarity builds trust and momentum.

quizQuestions.question: When energy drops mid-session, what is a strong first move?
options: A quick interactive reset or structured check-in
quizQuestions.correctAnswer: A quick interactive reset or structured check-in
quizQuestions.explanation: Short resets bring focus without shaming learners.

modules.title: Classroom Culture and Student Support
modules.description: High-expectation, supportive environments and response patterns.

checkpoints.title: Write one calm redirection script
checkpoints.description: Practice respectful language you can use when norms need reinforcement.

quizQuestions.question: If one student dominates discussion, what should you try first?
options: Structured turns that invite quieter voices
quizQuestions.correctAnswer: Structured turns that invite quieter voices

modules.title: From Plan to Practice
modules.description: Turn outlines into teachable sessions. Then complete the Lesson Design Studio capstone in the portal.

checkpoints.title: One change for your next session
checkpoints.description: After the video, note one concrete improvement you will apply.

quizQuestions.question: Where do you build and submit your full class plan after these modules?
quizQuestions.explanation: Lesson Design Studio is the v1 training capstone.
